message:
test(bd-qpwf): add unit tests for protocol/schema.rs validation gaps

Cover untested validation branches:
- ValidationError Display/Debug/Clone/Error traits
- json_type_name for all 7 JSON types
- multipleOf number constraint
- minProperties/maxProperties object constraints
- prefixItems tuple validation and with additional items schema
- Draft 4-7 array items fallback
- additionalProperties as schema object
- make_strict_schema with prefixItems and union types
- Unknown type permissiveness and invalid schema handling

13 new tests → 43 total.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
